recommendations.title: Crystal Moon
recommendations.overview: The fairy tale story of Maria da Graça, a small town girl with big time dreams of becoming a singer, who moves to Rio de Janeiro to pursue her ambitions.

recommendations.title: Wish Upon a Star
recommendations.overview: A younger sister wishes to switch places with her popular older sister and the two bickering siblings awaken to find the wish has come true.

recommendations.title: My Name Ain't Johnny
recommendations.overview: The true story of João Guilherme Estrella ("Johnny"), a young middle-class bon vivant who became a big-time cocaine dealer in Rio de Janeiro in the early 1990s.

recommendations.title: Deidra & Laney Rob a Train
recommendations.overview: After their mother ends up in jail, two sisters turn to train robbery in order to support their family.

recommendations.title: Shelter
recommendations.overview: Forced to give up his dreams of art school, Zach works dead-end jobs to support his sister and her son. Questioning his life, he paints, surfs and hangs out with his best friend, Gabe. When Gabe's older brother returns home for the summer, Zach sudde

recommendations.title: My Neighbor Totoro
recommendations.overview: Two sisters move to the country with their father in order to be closer to their hospitalized mother, and discover the surrounding trees are inhabited by Totoros, magical spirits of the forest. When the youngest runs away from home, the older sister

recommendations.title: Her Blue Sky
recommendations.overview: High school student Aoi Aioi lives with her elder sister, Akane, after a tragic accident took their parents away 13 years ago. Because Akane has since been taking care of her single-handedly, Aoi wants to move to Tokyo after her graduation to relieve

recommendations.title: Violation
recommendations.overview: A troubled woman on the edge of divorce returns home to her younger sister after years apart. But when her sister and brother-in-law betray her trust, she embarks on a vicious crusade of revenge.

recommendations.title: Casa Grande
recommendations.overview: As a privileged teenager living in an affluent suburb of Rio de Janeiro, Jean has little to worry about beyond games, grades and girls. But as his overbearing father drags the family into debt, Jean is forced into a change of lifestyle which opens hi

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.
